params.name: Floor Index
params.desc: The floor to call the event on

params.name: Event
params.desc: The common event to start on floor entry

params.name: Exit Spawn Event
params.desc: The common event to start when exit spawn

params.name: Identifier
params.desc: The identifier used to load map data

params.name: Display Name
params.desc: What to display for map name

params.name: BGM
params.desc: BGM to play on the map

params.name: BGS
params.desc: BGS to play on the map

params.name: Map Width Random Bonus
params.desc: Randomly apply up to max set to size

params.name: Map Height Random Bonus
params.desc: Randomly apply up to max set to size

params.name: Map Depth Events
params.desc: Call events on entry to map floor

params.name: No Exit Gate
params.desc: Prevents spawning of final exit gate

params.name: Sealed Exit Gates
params.desc: Seals the exit gate with identified seal games

params.name: Sealed Start Gate
params.desc: Seals the entry gate with identified seal games

params.name: Random Deconstruction Bonus
params.desc: Random bonus time before map breaks apart

params.name: Tileset
params.desc: The tileset to use for the map

params.name: Edge Region
params.desc: Set region ID for edge tiles

params.name: Map Enemies
params.desc: Setup enemies to appear on map

params.name: Require Defeat All Enemies
params.desc: Must defeat all enemies for exit to appear

params.name: Map Boss
params.desc: Must be defeated for exit to appear

params.name: Simon Configuration
params.desc: The configuration setting for the simon game.

params.desc: Spawns understrike games on interest paths

params.desc: Spawns seal break games on interest paths

params.desc: Spawns path games on interest paths

params.desc: Require completion of path trace games

params.desc: Position of map to transfer player to

params.desc: Position of map to transfer player to
